allow: PowerShell($userPath = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); if \($userPath -match [regex]::Escape\('.bun\\bin'\)\) { Write-Output "USER PATH contains .bun\\bin \(will work in NEW shells\)" } else { Write-Output "USER PATH does NOT contain .bun\\bin" }; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output $userPath)
